buildCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/overthrone run build && rm -rf public && mkdir -p public && if [ -d dist/public ]; then cp -R dist/public/. public/; elif [ -d artifacts/overthrone/dist/public ]; then cp -R artifacts/overthrone/dist/public/. public/; else echo 'Build output directory not found.'; pwd; ls -la; ls -la artifacts/overthrone || true; ls -la artifacts/overthrone/dist || true; exit 1; fi
